name: build_cover
description: Place oak_planks toward teammate for defensive cover
parameters: z.object({ targetPlayerName: z.string().describe("The name of the teammate to provide cover for"), itemName: z.string().default("oak_planks").describe("The type of block to use for cover"), maxBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(2).describe("The number of blocks to place in a pillar"), pillarDistance: z.number().min(1).max(4).default(2).describe("How far away from the teammate to place the cover") })
